mapper.select: select notification_id, user_id, type, title, content, related_type, related_id, is_read, read_at, create_at from notification where notification_id = #{notificationId}
mapper.insert: insert into notification (user_id, type, title, content, related_type, related_id, is_read, create_at) values (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{relatedType}, #{relatedId}, #{isRead}, #{createAt})
mapper.select: select count(*) from notification where user_id = #{userId} and is_read = 0
